title: Braised Red Cabbage with Apples
description: A hearty, comforting side dish perfect for the fall and winter seasons. The sweetness of the cabbage is balanced by the tanginess of the apples.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped apples and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chopped cabbage, apple cider vinegar, and brown sugar to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Cover the skillet and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the cabbage is tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
